title: gethealthapiavailability
description: Verify that GET /health returns 200 with status, db, and version fields when the API and database are healthy.

title: postv1authstartmagiclinkissuance
description: Verify that POST /v1/auth/start with a valid email returns 202 accepted and issues a magic link.

title: postv1authverifytokenvalidation
description: Verify that POST /v1/auth/verify with a valid token returns 200 with session_token and user profile.

title: postv1authlogoutsessiontermination
description: Verify that POST /v1/auth/logout with an active session returns 204 and ends the session.

title: postv1subscriptionscreatesubscription
description: Verify that POST /v1/subscriptions with valid session token and required fields creates a subscription and returns 201.

title: getv1subscriptionslistsubscriptions
description: Verify that GET /v1/subscriptions with a valid session token returns 200 with the user's subscriptions list.

title: patchv1subscriptionsupdatesubscription
description: Verify that PATCH /v1/subscriptions/{subscription_id} with valid session token updates owned subscription and returns 200 with updated data.

title: deletev1subscriptionsdeletesubscription
description: Verify that DELETE /v1/subscriptions/{subscription_id} with valid session token soft deletes the subscription and returns 204.

title: getv1alertslistalerts
description: Verify that GET /v1/alerts with valid session token returns 200 with the user's scheduled alerts.

title: postv1notificationsregistertoken
description: Verify that POST /v1/notifications/token with valid session token and valid platform registers a push notification token and returns 201.
